Despite a persistent bearish volatility smirk and extremely high Put/Call Ratios (up to 2.99 monthly) reflecting heavy hedging activity, the positive dealer gamma suppresses volatility and anchors the spot price near the monthly gamma flip at 6900.

The immediate 25200 strike exhibits massive resonance and acts as a primary magnetic anchor.
